import random; def initialize_game() -> list [int | bool]: return [random.randint(1, 100), 0, 10, 1, 100, False]

def get_valid_guess(game_state: list [int | bool]) -> int: while True: guess = input (f"Attempt {game_state [1]+1} (Range: {game_state[3]}-{game_state[4]}): "); if not guess.isdigit(): print ("Invalid input! Please enter a whole number "); elif int(guess) < game_state[3] or int(guess) > game_state[4]: print (f"Please enter a number between {game_state[3]} and {game_state[4]}"); else: break; return int(guess)

def process_guess(guess: int, game_state: list [int | bool]) -> list [int | bool]: game_state [1]+= 1; if guess == game_state [0]: print (f"Congratulations! You guessed the number {game_state[0]} in {game_state[1]} attempts"); game_state [5] = True; elif guess > game_state[0]: print('Too high'); game_state [4] = guess - 1; else: print ('Too low'); game_state [3] = guess + 1; return game_state
def transpose (sales_list: list [list [int]]) -> list [list [int]]: return [[sales_list[r][c] for r in range(len(sales_list))] for c in range(len(sales_list[0]))]
def shift (sales_list: list [list (int)), days: int) -> list [list [int]]: return [sales [days % len (sales_list[0]) : ] + sales [ : days % len (sales_list[0])] for sales in sales_list]
def shift_right (sales_list: list [list [int]), days: int) -> list [list [int]]: return shift(sales_list, len (sales_list[0])-days)

def initialize_game() -> list [int | bool]: secret_number = random.randint (1, 100); return [secret_number, 0, 10, 1, 100, False ]

def get_valid_guess(game_state: list [int | bool]) -> int: secret_number, attempts, max_attempts, low_bound, high_bound, game_over = game_state; current_attempt = attempts + 1; while True: print (f"Attempt {current_attempt} (Range: {low_bound}-{high_bound}): ", end=""); guess = input(); if not guess.isdigit(): print ("Invalid input! Please enter a whole number"); continue; guess_int = int(guess); if not (low_bound <= guess_int <= high_bound): print (f"Please enter a number between {low_bound} and {high_bound}. "); continue; return guess_int

def process_guess(guess: int, game_state: list [int | bool]) -> list [int | bool]: secret_number, attempts, max_attempts, low_bound, high_bound, game_over = game_state; attempts += 1; if secret_number == guess: print (f"Congratulations! You guessed the number {secret_number} in {attempts} attempts!"); game_over = True; elif secret_number > guess: print("Too low!"); low_bound = guess + 1; elif secret_number < guess: print("Too high!"); high_bound = guess - 1; return [secret_number, attempts, max_attempts, low_bound, high_bound, game_over]

def shift_right (sales_list: list [list [int]), days: int) -> list [list [int]]: return shift(sales_list, len (sales_list[0])-days)

def is_divisible (n: int, k: int) -> bool: remainder: int = n%k; if remainder == 0: return True; else: return False
def is_prime (n: int) -> bool: for k in range (2, n): result: bool = is-divisible (n,k); if result == True: return False; return True

def get_primes (n: int) -> tuple [int, list [int]]: counter: int = 0; return_list: list [int] = []; for i in range(2, n+1): result: bool = is_prime(i); if result == True: counter += 1; return_list.append(i); return counter, return_list

def rotate_clockwise(lst: list [list [int]]) -> list [list [int]]: n = len(lst); return_list = [[0]*n for _ in range(n)]; for row in range(n): for col in range(n): return_list [col] [(n-1)-row] = lst [row][col]; return return_list

def purchase_item (balance: int, item: str, price: int, amount: int = 1) -> tuple [int, str, int]: total_cost: int = price * amount; if balance >= total_cost: return balance - total_cost, item, amount; else: return balance, item, 0

You guessed the number {game_state[0]} in {game_state [1]} attempts!"); game_state [5] = True; elif guess < game_state [0]: print("Too low!"); game_state [3] = guess + 1; else: print("Too high!"); game_state [4] = guess - 1; return game_state
def transpose (sales_list: list [list [int]]) -> list [list [int]]: return [[sales_list[r] [c] for r in range (len (sales_list))] for c in range (len( sales_list[0]))]

def shift (sales_list: list [list [int]], days: int) -> list [list [int]]: return [[sales_list[r] [(c + days) % len(sales_list [0])] for c in range (len(sales_list[0]))] for r in range (len(sales_list))]
def shift_right (sales_list: list [list [int]], days: int) -> list [list [int]]: return shift (sales_list, len (sales_list [0]) - (days % len (sales_list [0])))
